canvas.title:
CODE
THAT
WORKS.
canvas.desc: Every project ships with clean code, fast UX, and data‑backed decisions. We deploy AI with Cursor, Claude, and adjacent tools — from landing pages to automation.

items.q: How much is a website — and how long does it take?
items.a: Standalone web engagements (Websites tab): landing from €500 in 5–7 days; corporate site from €1500 in 2–4 weeks; e‑commerce is scoped individually. Bundles combine site + marketing — see Bundles.

items.q: Can you work with our existing site?
items.a: Yes. We'll audit what's there, prioritize fixes, and propose concrete improvements — from SEO to conversion optimization.

items.q: What ad budget do you recommend?
items.a: It depends on the niche. As a starting point, from ~€500/mo on Google Ads and ~€300/mo on Meta Ads. We begin with a testing phase and optimize from results.
Each engagement defines KPIs — conversions, ROI, CPL, and channel efficiency. We use Analytics, Tag Manager, and platform data. You get monthly reporting with plain numbers.
Always. Scope, timelines, pricing, and responsibilities are written down — no surprise fees. Confidentiality is standard; sensitive programs can be covered by a separate NDA.

items.q: What if I only want a consultation?
items.a: Book a free 30‑minute video call or email us. We'll outline options — no obligation.

items.q: Which AI services do you offer?
items.a: AI chatbots, workflow automation with Cursor / Claude Code, and integrations. The free AI consult helps decide what to prioritize first.

items.q: Can I buy ads management without a new website?
items.a: Yes. We run Google Ads, Meta Ads, or full‑stack media — from €249/mo — on your existing properties.
Bank transfer against VAT invoice. Projects: 50% upfront, balance on completion. Retainers: monthly billing.
Yes — EU and beyond. We work in Lithuanian, English, and Russian. Meetings on Meet or Zoom.

cookie.text: This site uses cookies to provide the best experience.

privacy: This policy explains how we handle personal data — clearly, without unnecessary noise. We collect only what's needed to respond to inquiries and deliver services.
Data from the contact form is used to reply and to continue project communication. Analytics or third‑party tools follow their vendors' policies and your cookie choices.
We don't sell personal data. Confidential engagements are often covered by an NDA — when signed, those stricter rules apply.
You may request export or deletion by email. We retain documents as required for accounting and contractual compliance.
Updates are posted here; material changes may be emailed to active clients.
terms: By using this site and our services, you accept these terms. Scope, pricing, and timelines are confirmed in proposals and agreements — website copy is indicative.
Intellectual property: until full payment, deliverables may remain partially retained per contract. After settlement, we transfer agreed‑upon files as specified.
Confidentiality: both parties protect each other's business information. We can sign an NDA before sharing strategic materials.
Third‑party tools are provided “as is”; read vendor terms separately. Applicable law: Republic of Lithuania. Disputes: negotiate first, then competent courts in Lithuania.
